activities.description: Get the parameters to be used in this pipeline.

activities.name: cp_get_latest_file
activities.description: Copy all the files created since the last start date and combine them into one file to be processed into Destination.

activities.description: Check if the combined file has any data to be loaded

ifTrueActivities.name: cp_raw_to_stage_spm_table
ifTrueActivities.description: Copying data from raw to staging table "SPMPurchaseOrderVendorDelivery".

ifTrueActivities.name: cp_stage_spm_to_jde_temp
ifTrueActivities.description: Copying data from staging table "SPMPurchaseOrderVendorDelivery" to JDE temp table "CBIADHOC.SPMOTEMP.

sqlReaderQuery.value:
Select DISTINCT 
 case when spmpo.ProjectDescription IS NULL THEN  ltrim(rtrim([PO_NUMBER]))
ELSE ltrim(rtrim(PO_NUMBER)) + '-00' END PO_NUMBER
 ,  ([POLI_POS]  + CAST([POLI_SUB_POS] as float)/1000) * 1000 as LineNumber
FROM [Staging].[SPMPurchaseOrderVendorDelivery] spmpovd
left join Conforming.SPMPO spmpo
on spmpovd.PROJ_ID = spmpo.ProjectId
where  PROJ_ID <> 'US017' 
AND JDE_SUPPLIER_NUMBER <> 'No Need'

ifTrueActivities.name: cp_jde_temp_to_stage_loa_table
ifTrueActivities.description: Copying data from JDE temp table "CBIADHOC.SPMOTEMP" to staging table "LOAPurchaseOrderVendorDelivery".

query.value:
SELECT distinct
	'NA' AS PROJ_ID,
	Table__3.MCDL01 AS PROJECT_DESCRIPTION,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDOMCU AS JDE_PROJ_NUMBER,
	Table__3.MCRP03 AS OPERATING_GROUP,
	'NA' AS SECTOR,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDMCU AS Client,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDAN8 AS JDE_SUPPLIER_NUMBER,
    PDAN8.ABALPH AS SUPPLIER_NAME,
    CBIDTA.F4311.PDITM AS IDENT,
    CBIDTA.F4311.PDURRF AS TAG_NUMBER,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDDSC1 AS Description,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDDOCO AS PO_NUMBER,
	'NA' AS SPM_POH_ID,
	'NA' AS SUPPLEMENT,
	'NA' AS SUP_POH_ID,
	'NA' AS POLI_POS,
	'NA' AS POLI_SUB_POS,
    CBIDTA.F43121.PRNLIN AS ITEM_SHIP_POS,
    CBIDTA.F43121.PRALIN/1000 AS ITEM_SHIP_SUB_POS,
    'NA' AS FREIGHT_TERM,
    CASE WHEN CBIDTA.F4311.PDUORG = 0 THEN 0 ELSE CBIDTA.F4311.PDUORG / DDF('UORG') END AS POLI_QTY,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDUOM3 AS UOM,
	CJDEDTGD(CBIDTA.F4311.PDPDDJ) AS ISH_PROM_CONTRACT_DATE,
    CJDEDTGD(CBIDTA.F43121.PRRCDJ) AS MATL_RECV_DATE,
    'NA' AS ISH_ITEM_SHIP_QTY,  
    CBIDTA.F43121.PRUREC/1000 AS RECV_QTY,    
    CBIDTA.F43121.PRDCT AS RECV_TYPE,
    CBIDTA.F43121.PRDOC AS RECV_DOC_NUMBER, 
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDDOCO AS JDE_PO_NUMBER,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDLNID/1000 AS JDE_PO_LINE,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDDCTO AS ORDER_TYPE,
	CASE WHEN LENGTH(CBIDTA.F4311.PDSFXO) = 0 THEN '000' ELSE CBIDTA.F4311.PDSFXO END AS ORDER_SUFFIX,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDCO AS ACCOUNT_COMPANY,
	CBIDTA.F4301.PHKCOO AS ORDER_COMPANY,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDVR01 SPM_PO_NUMBER,
	CBIDTA.F43121.PRDOC AS SORId,
	'E1.CBIDTA.F43121.PRDOC' as SystemOfRecord
FROM
  ( 
  SELECT  aban8, alan8, abeftb, aleftb, abdc, abalph, aladd1, aladd2, aladd3, aladd4, aladdz, alcty1, alcoun, aladds, alctr, abac27
FROM CBIDTA.f0101, CBIDTA.f0116
WHERE aban8 = alan8
and    abeftb = aleftb
  ) AS PHANBY RIGHT OUTER JOIN CBIDTA.F4301 ON (PHANBY.ABAN8=CBIDTA.F4301.PHANBY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN CBIDTA.F4311 ON (CBIDTA.F4301.PHDOCO = CBIDTA.F4311.PDDOCO AND CBIDTA.F4301.PHDCTO = CBIDTA.F4311.PDDCTO AND CBIDTA.F4301.PHKCOO = CBIDTA.F4311.PDKCOO)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN CBIDTA.F0006  Table__20 ON (Table__20.MCMCU=CBIDTA.F4311.PDOMCU)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
  SELECT  aban8, alan8, abeftb, aleftb, abdc, abalph, aladd1, aladd2, aladd3, aladd4, aladdz, alcty1, alcoun, aladds, alctr, abac27
FROM CBIDTA.f0101, CBIDTA.f0116
WHERE aban8 = alan8
and    abeftb = aleftb
  ) AS PDAN8 ON (PDAN8.ABAN8=CBIDTA.F4311.PDAN8)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN CBIDTA.F43121 ON (CBIDTA.F43121.PRKCOO = CBIDTA.F4301.PHKCOO  AND  CBIDTA.F43121.PRDCTO = CBIDTA.F4311.PDDCTO  AND  CBIDTA.F43121.PRSFXO = CBIDTA.F4311.PDSFXO  AND  CBIDTA.F43121.PRDOCO = CBIDTA.F4311.PDDOCO  AND  CBIDTA.F43121.PRLNID = CBIDTA.F4311.PDLNID)
   INNER JOIN CBIDTA.F0006  Table__19 ON (Table__19.MCMCU=CBIDTA.F4311.PDMCU)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
  SELECT CCCO, MCMCU, MCMCUS, MCDL01, CCNAME, MCRP03, integer(POWER(10, INTEGER(CVCDEC))) AS CDIV 
FROM CBIDTA.F0006
INNER JOIN CBIDTA.F0010 ON MCCO = CCCO
INNER JOIN CBIDTA.F0013 on  CCCRCD = CVCRCD
  ) AS Table__3 ON (Table__3.MCMCU=CBIDTA.F4311.PDMCU)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
SELECT * 
FROM CBIDTA.F0010
  ) AS PHKCOO ON (PHKCOO.CCCO=CBIDTA.F4301.PHKCOO)  
WHERE
  (
   CBIDTA.F4311.PDDCTO  IN  ( 'OS','OH','OG','OP'  )
   AND
   CBIDTA.F4311.PDLTTR  <>  '980'
   AND
   CJDEDTGD(CBIDTA.F4311.PDTRDJ)  >=  {d '2013-01-01'}
   AND
   CJDEDTGD(CBIDTA.F4311.PDDGL) BETWEEN DATE(CURRENT_DATE - DAY(CURRENT_DATE) DAY +1 DAY - 1 MONTH) AND DATE(CURRENT_DATE  -DAY(CURRENT_DATE) DAY)
   AND 
   CBIDTA.F4311.PDAN8 NOT IN ('1545782','248743','203756','3838634','4382000','790516','275469','388421','2718930','3893692','3032905','3895153','5411845','2435374','3838634','3712812','5906987','3838589','1509642','3899365','738021')
  )
  AND length(CJDEDTGD(CBIDTA.F43121.PRRCDJ)) > 0 
  AND CJDEDTGD(CBIDTA.F43121.PRRCDJ) between DATE(CURRENT_DATE - DAY(CURRENT_DATE) DAY +1 DAY - 1 MONTH) AND  DATE(CURRENT_DATE  -DAY(CURRENT_DATE) DAY)
  AND (CBIDTA.F43121.PRDCT = 'OV' OR CBIDTA.F43121.PRDCT IS NULL)
UNION ALL
SELECT distinct
	'NA' AS PROJ_ID,
	Table__3.MCDL01 AS PROJECT_DESCRIPTION,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDOMCU AS JDE_PROJ_NUMBER,
	Table__3.MCRP03 AS OPERATING_GROUP,
	'NA' AS SECTOR,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDMCU AS Client,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDAN8 AS JDE_SUPPLIER_NUMBER,
    PDAN8.ABALPH AS SUPPLIER_NAME,
    CBIDTA.F4311.PDITM AS IDENT,
    CBIDTA.F4311.PDURRF AS TAG_NUMBER,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDDSC1 AS Description,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDDOCO AS PO_NUMBER,
	'NA' AS SPM_POH_ID,
	'NA' AS SUPPLEMENT,
	'NA' AS SUP_POH_ID,
	'NA' AS POLI_POS,
	'NA' AS POLI_SUB_POS,
    CBIDTA.F43121.PRNLIN AS ITEM_SHIP_POS,
    CBIDTA.F43121.PRALIN/1000 AS ITEM_SHIP_SUB_POS,
    'NA' AS FREIGHT_TERM,
    CASE WHEN CBIDTA.F4311.PDUORG = 0 THEN 0
		ELSE
			CBIDTA.F4311.PDUORG / DDF('UORG') 
	END AS POLI_QTY,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDUOM3 AS UOM,
	CJDEDTGD(CBIDTA.F4311.PDPDDJ) AS ISH_PROM_CONTRACT_DATE,
    CJDEDTGD(CBIDTA.F43121.PRRCDJ) AS MATL_RECV_DATE,
    'NA' AS ISH_ITEM_SHIP_QTY,  
    CBIDTA.F43121.PRUREC/1000 AS RECV_QTY,    
    CBIDTA.F43121.PRDCT AS RECV_TYPE,
    CBIDTA.F43121.PRDOC AS RECV_DOC_NUMBER, 
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDDOCO AS JDE_PO_NUMBER,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDLNID/1000 AS JDE_PO_LINE,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDDCTO AS ORDER_TYPE,
	CASE WHEN LENGTH(CBIDTA.F4311.PDSFXO) = 0 THEN '000' ELSE CBIDTA.F4311.PDSFXO END AS ORDER_SUFFIX,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDCO AS ACCOUNT_COMPANY,
	CBIDTA.F4301.PHKCOO AS ORDER_COMPANY,
	CBIDTA.F4311.PDVR01 SPM_PO_NUMBER,
	CBIDTA.F43121.PRDOC AS SORId,
	'E1.CBIDTA.F43121.PRDOC' as SystemOfRecord
FROM
  ( 
  SELECT  aban8, alan8, abeftb, aleftb, abdc, abalph, aladd1, aladd2, aladd3, aladd4, aladdz, alcty1, alcoun, aladds, alctr, abac27
FROM CBIDTA.f0101, CBIDTA.f0116
WHERE aban8 = alan8
and    abeftb = aleftb
  ) AS PHANBY RIGHT OUTER JOIN CBIDTA.F4301 ON (PHANBY.ABAN8=CBIDTA.F4301.PHANBY)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN CBIDTA.F4311 ON (CBIDTA.F4301.PHDOCO = CBIDTA.F4311.PDDOCO AND CBIDTA.F4301.PHDCTO = CBIDTA.F4311.PDDCTO AND CBIDTA.F4301.PHKCOO = CBIDTA.F4311.PDKCOO)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN CBIDTA.F0006  Table__20 ON (Table__20.MCMCU=CBIDTA.F4311.PDOMCU)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
  SELECT  aban8, alan8, abeftb, aleftb, abdc, abalph, aladd1, aladd2, aladd3, aladd4, aladdz, alcty1, alcoun, aladds, alctr, abac27
FROM CBIDTA.f0101, CBIDTA.f0116
WHERE aban8 = alan8
and    abeftb = aleftb
  ) AS PDAN8 ON (PDAN8.ABAN8=CBIDTA.F4311.PDAN8)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN CBIDTA.F43121 ON (CBIDTA.F43121.PRKCOO = CBIDTA.F4301.PHKCOO  AND  CBIDTA.F43121.PRDCTO = CBIDTA.F4311.PDDCTO  AND  CBIDTA.F43121.PRSFXO = CBIDTA.F4311.PDSFXO  AND  CBIDTA.F43121.PRDOCO = CBIDTA.F4311.PDDOCO  AND  CBIDTA.F43121.PRLNID = CBIDTA.F4311.PDLNID)
   INNER JOIN CBIDTA.F0006  Table__19 ON (Table__19.MCMCU=CBIDTA.F4311.PDMCU)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
  SELECT   CCCO, MCMCU, MCMCUS, MCDL01, CCNAME, MCRP03, integer(POWER(10, INTEGER(CVCDEC))) AS CDIV 
FROM CBIDTA.F0006
INNER JOIN CBIDTA.F0010 ON MCCO = CCCO
INNER JOIN CBIDTA.F0013 on  CCCRCD = CVCRCD
  ) AS Table__3 ON (Table__3.MCMCU=CBIDTA.F4311.PDMCU)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
  SELECT * 
FROM CBIDTA.F0010
  ) AS PHKCOO ON (PHKCOO.CCCO=CBIDTA.F4301.PHKCOO)
  INNER JOIN CBIADHOC.SPMPOTEMP spmtmp
  ON 
spmtmp.PONUMBER = CBIDTA.F4311.PDVR01
AND spmtmp.LINEID = CBIDTA.F4311.PDLNID

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT PROJ_ID, PROJECT_DESCRIPTION, JDE_PROJ_NUMBER, OPERATING_GROUP, SECTOR, Client, JDE_SUPPLIER_NUMBER, IDENT, Description, TAG_NUMBER, 
                         SUPPLIER_NAME, PO_NUMBER, SPM_POH_ID, SUPPLEMENT, SUP_POH_ID, POLI_POS, POLI_SUB_POS, ITEM_SHIP_POS, ITEM_SHIP_SUB_POS, 
                         FREIGHT_TERM, CAST(POLI_QTY as decimal(31,3)) as POLI_QTY, UOM, ISH_PROM_CONTRACT_DATE, MATL_RECV_DATE, ISH_ITEM_SHIP_QTY,
CAST(RECV_QTY as decimal(31,3)) as RECV_QTY, RECV_TYPE, RECV_DOC_NUMBER, 
                         JDE_PO_NUMBER, JDE_PO_LINE, ORDER_TYPE, ORDER_SUFFIX, ORDER_COMPANY, ACCOUNT_COMPANY
FROM [Logistics].[PurchaseOrderVendorDeliveryZycus]
where  BatchDate = (SELECT MAX(BatchDate) from [Logistics].[PurchaseOrderVendorDeliveryZycus])
AND LEN(PROJ_ID) > 0
ORDER BY PROJ_ID,MATL_RECV_DATE

activities.name: Delete Temp combined File
activities.description: After the data has been loaded, clear the combined file from the ADLSV2
